navy_blue.usage: Primary brand colour. Used for ZONNIC logo text on light/gradient backgrounds.

white.usage: Used for ZONNIC logo text on dark backgrounds only.

regulatory_rules.rule: Every marketing asset MUST include a bilingual nicotine warning statement banner at the TOP of the creative.
regulatory_rules.required_text_en: WARNING: This product contains nicotine. Nicotine is highly addictive. Only to be used by adults who are trying to quit smoking.
regulatory_rules.required_text_fr: AVERTISSEMENT : Ce produit contient de la nicotine. La nicotine crée une forte dépendance. À utiliser uniquement par des adultes qui désirent cesser de fumer.

regulatory_rules.rule: The 18+ icon must be present on marketing materials to indicate age restriction.
Every marketing asset MUST include risk communication text at the BOTTOM of the creative.
regulatory_rules.required_text: This product may not be right for you. Always read and follow the label.

regulatory_rules.rule: The nicotine warning banner must be positioned at the TOP of the asset. The risk communication and 18+ icon must be at the BOTTOM. This placement is consistent across all compliant examples in the guidelines.
The nicotine warning must appear in BOTH English and French on every asset. English uses 'WARNING:', French uses 'AVERTISSEMENT :'.

logo_rules.rule: The ZONNIC logo consists of navy blue typographic text with a circular halo around the letter C. The halo colour varies by product flavour profile.
On gradient backgrounds, the C halo must be set in the secondary colour within the gradient, associated to the product's flavour profile.
On gradient backgrounds, the word ZONNIC must always be set in navy blue (#242c65).
The monochromatic logo option is EXCLUSIVELY for Corporate & External communications and diminished accessibility purposes. In all other cases, always use the colour ZONNIC logo.
On a white or grey gradient background, the C halo must always use the full gradient, consisting of both the primary and secondary colours.
On white or grey gradient backgrounds, the word ZONNIC must be rendered in navy blue (#242c65).
On light image backgrounds, the C halo must always use the full gradient (primary + secondary colours).
On light image backgrounds, the word ZONNIC must be in navy blue for readability.
On dark image backgrounds, the C halo must always use the full gradient (primary + secondary colours).
On dark image backgrounds, the word ZONNIC must be in white for readability.
The logo must have a clear safety zone around it. The safety zone is 50% of the height of the C character. No other elements may intrude into this zone.
Logo minimum size for screen: 20px height. Logo minimum size for print: 7mm height.
The logo should never be altered or recreated in any way.
Text following the logo in NRT lockups must be in Uppercase Santral Semi Bold, followed by a vertical bar ( | ) and Uppercase Santral Book.

Approved NRT lockup text options are: Option 1 (centre-aligned): 'NICOTINE POUCHES' + 'NICOTINE REPLACEMENT THERAPY'. Option 2 (centre-aligned): 'NICOTINE REPLACEMENT THERAPY' only. Option 1 (left-aligned OOH): 'NICOTINE POUCHES | NICOTINE REPLACEMENT THERAPY'. Option 2 (left-aligned OOH): 'NICOTINE REPLACEMENT THERAPY'. Option 3 (left-aligned OOH): 'NICOTINE POUCHES'. No other text combinations are permitted.

logo_donts.rule: Don't lose the C halo (logo without any halo on the C).
logo_donts.visual_description: ZONNIC text shown without any circular element on the C.

logo_donts.rule: Don't add the halo on the Z instead of the C.
logo_donts.visual_description: Halo circle placed on the Z letter instead of C.

logo_donts.rule: Don't add an outline over a coloured halo.
logo_donts.visual_description: C halo has both a fill colour and a visible outline stroke.

logo_donts.rule: Don't enlarge the halo beyond its standard proportional size.
logo_donts.visual_description: C halo is disproportionately larger than the logo text.

logo_donts.rule: Don't use gradients in the logo text itself.
logo_donts.visual_description: The ZONNIC letters have gradient fills instead of solid navy blue or white.

logo_donts.rule: Don't lose the halo over the background colour (halo blends into background).
logo_donts.visual_description: Halo colour matches the background making it invisible.
ZONNIC text has visible outline/stroke instead of solid fill.

logo_donts.rule: Don't reverse the outline of the halo.
Don't use the same colour for the outline, halo, or the background colour of the halo.
logo_donts.visual_description: Halo, outline, and background are all the same colour.

logo_donts.rule: Don't use dark backgrounds with the standard navy blue logo.
logo_donts.visual_description: Navy blue ZONNIC text on a dark/navy background with poor contrast.

logo_donts.rule: Don't outline other letters in the logo (only C gets the halo).
logo_donts.visual_description: Other letters besides C have circular outlines or halos.

logo_donts.rule: Don't reverse the logo colour (e.g. using light-coloured text for ZONNIC on light backgrounds).
logo_donts.visual_description: Logo uses non-standard colour that doesn't match background rules.

logo_donts.rule: Don't modify the logo layout or arrangement (e.g. stacking letters, changing proportions).
logo_donts.visual_description: Logo text is rearranged, stacked (ZON/NIC), or structurally altered.

logo_donts.rule: Don't mismatch flavour-specific colours in the halo (using wrong flavour colour).
logo_donts.visual_description: Halo colour doesn't match the flavour gradient used in the design.

logo_donts.rule: Don't distort the halo shape (stretch, squash, or skew the circular halo).
logo_donts.visual_description: C halo is oval, stretched, or non-circular.

logo_donts_gradients_backgrounds.rule: Don't use the same colour for both the halo and the gradient background.
logo_donts_gradients_backgrounds.visual_description: Halo disappears into gradient because same colour is used.

logo_donts_gradients_backgrounds.rule: Don't use the same colour for both the halo and a flat background.
Don't mismatch the logo from its flavour gradient (wrong flavour pairing).
logo_donts_gradients_backgrounds.visual_description: Green-flavour halo used on blue-flavour gradient background.

logo_donts_gradients_backgrounds.rule: Don't make the second halo white.
logo_donts_gradients_backgrounds.visual_description: The secondary part of the halo gradient is white instead of the secondary colour.

logo_donts_gradients_backgrounds.rule: Don't use gradients in the logo text on gradient backgrounds.
logo_donts_gradients_backgrounds.visual_description: ZONNIC letters have gradient fills on a gradient background.

logo_donts_gradients_backgrounds.rule: Don't use the navy logo over dark images.
logo_donts_gradients_backgrounds.visual_description: Navy blue ZONNIC text on dark photograph — poor readability.

logo_donts_gradients_backgrounds.rule: Don't use the white logo over light images.
logo_donts_gradients_backgrounds.visual_description: White ZONNIC text on light photograph — poor readability.

logo_donts_gradients_backgrounds.rule: Don't place the logo into any shape (box, circle, badge) over images.
logo_donts_gradients_backgrounds.visual_description: Logo enclosed in a rectangular or shaped container overlaid on an image.

gradient_rules.rule: Gradient must flow vertically: primary (dark) colour starts at the top and fades downward to the secondary (light) colour at the bottom.
The gradient colour balance must be 70% primary colour (dark, top) and 30% secondary colour (light, bottom). This ratio must always be respected.
Never position the logo below 20% of the total gradient height, as the logo will lose visibility in the lighter secondary colour zone.
The signature grey gradient background is created from an image. It MUST be used on creatives at 50% opacity on a white background.
Grey gradient backgrounds are available in standard formats: 4:5, 9:16, and 16:9 with default and alternative versions for each.

color_application_rules.rule: Use the primary colour from the gradient (colour 1, dark) as the main visual cue for navigating the product portfolio.

The secondary colour (colour 2, light) should primarily appear on the side label halo C in packaging. It can also be used in bespoke activations when paired with a primary white execution and accented with colour 2.
For flavour-led assets, use either the primary colour (1) or the full gradient (1 & 2) to clearly communicate the flavour profile.
The secondary colour must only be used as an accent shade, never as a full background colour.

content_type_rules.rule: Flavour-related content must use primary colour (1) or full gradient (1 & 2) as the background.
Educational content must leverage the grey background and secondary colours in a purposeful manner (as accents only).
Brand purpose content should use grey & white background, properly laid out.

content_donts.rule: Don't use the secondary colour as a full background — only as an accent.
content_donts.visual_description: Full background is light secondary colour instead of grey/primary.

content_donts.rule: Don't use the gradient in a non-flavour-led visual. Non-flavour content should use the grey background.
content_donts.visual_description: Gradient background used for educational/brand content that isn't about flavours.

content_donts.rule: Don't use a grey gradient background that doesn't follow the guideline (wrong opacity, wrong direction, etc.).
content_donts.visual_description: Grey gradient is too dark, wrong direction, or not at 50% opacity.

content_donts.rule: Don't use a solid white background for flavour-led visuals. It should be a primary colour (1) or gradient (1 & 2).
content_donts.visual_description: Flavour product shown on plain white background with no gradient or brand colour.

typography_rules.rule: The primary typeface is Santral. It is available in four weights: Black, Bold, SemiBold, and Book.
Santral is the main typography on packaging and must be used across all communications for cohesive branding. No other typefaces should be used.
In NRT lockups, text following the logo must use Uppercase Santral Semi Bold, followed by a vertical bar ( | ) separator, then Uppercase Santral Book.

ai_evaluation_checklist.name: Regulatory: Nicotine Warning Present
ai_evaluation_checklist.description: Does the image contain a nicotine warning statement at the TOP? Must be bilingual (English 'WARNING:' + French 'AVERTISSEMENT :').

ai_evaluation_checklist.name: Regulatory: 18+ Icon Present
ai_evaluation_checklist.description: Is the 18+ age restriction icon present in the image?

ai_evaluation_checklist.name: Regulatory: Risk Communication Present
ai_evaluation_checklist.description: Does the image contain the risk communication text at the BOTTOM? Expected: 'This product may not be right for you. Always read and follow the label.'

ai_evaluation_checklist.name: Logo Presence
ai_evaluation_checklist.description: Is the ZONNIC logo present in the image?

ai_evaluation_checklist.name: Logo Text Colour vs Background
ai_evaluation_checklist.description: Is the ZONNIC text navy blue (#242c65) on light backgrounds and white (#FFFFFF) on dark backgrounds?

ai_evaluation_checklist.name: C Halo Presence and Correctness
ai_evaluation_checklist.description: Does the C have a circular halo? Is it the correct colour for the flavour? Is it properly sized and not distorted?

ai_evaluation_checklist.name: Logo Integrity
ai_evaluation_checklist.description: Is the logo unmodified? No gradients in text, no outlines, no distortion, no stacking?

ai_evaluation_checklist.name: Background Type Detection
ai_evaluation_checklist.description: What type of background is used? Gradient, grey, white, image (light/dark), solid colour?

ai_evaluation_checklist.name: Gradient Compliance
ai_evaluation_checklist.description: If gradient is present: does it flow top-to-bottom with 70/30 split? Is logo above the 20% line?

ai_evaluation_checklist.name: Content Type vs Background Match
ai_evaluation_checklist.description: Is the content flavour-led or educational/brand purpose? Does the background match accordingly?

ai_evaluation_checklist.name: Colour Palette Compliance
ai_evaluation_checklist.description: Are only approved brand colours used? Are colours from the correct flavour palette?

ai_evaluation_checklist.name: Typography Check
ai_evaluation_checklist.description: Is Santral font used? Are the correct weights applied? Is NRT lockup text correctly formatted?

ai_evaluation_checklist.name: Grey Gradient Background
ai_evaluation_checklist.description: If grey gradient is used, is it at 50% opacity on white? Does it follow format guidelines?

ai_evaluation_checklist.name: Logo Safety Zone
ai_evaluation_checklist.description: Is the logo safety zone (50% of C height) respected? Are other elements too close to the logo?

ai_evaluation_checklist.name: Logo on Background Dont's
ai_evaluation_checklist.description: Check for halo blending into background, flavour mismatch, logo in shapes, and other gradient/background specific violations.
